'''Yndis Mylore''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] governor of [[Bryexx]] and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Varvenna sector/Legends|Varvenna sector]]. [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]] served as his chef before working for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]].

{{Char-stub}}
